emails.subject: bkb schedule
emails.body: Here is the schedule -Our game Wednesday is at 7:00-Matt and Eric are playing flag football-Pat and Jody, can you fill in this week? Everyone let me know if you can play or not. fall-Bbkb schedule.doc
